Introwise

Introwise

•2 reviews

Daily is an amazing batteries-included video calling provider. We're using them at Introwise to power our in-browser video calls with live streaming and recording, and only hear positive things from our end users about the call reliability and quality. Their SDK is the simplest that I've seen from the integration viewpoint. It hides the complexity, but also allows to go low-level for implementing really customized user experience. The support and community are top-notch.

#### What's great [...] #### What's great

Fireside

used Daily.co to build Fireside

•4 reviews

Daily has been instrumental for Fireside - we use it as our main vendor for supporting recording and video calls. We were initially using Whereby, but Daily's AI features, integration with Deepgram, flexibility and ease of use make it a crucial part of our stack.

Reviews

No reviews yetBe the first to leave a review for The Daily Product

ElevenAgents by ElevenLabs [...] Hi Hunters! If you're like me, you try to stay on top of the newest tech, apps, and conversations within the Product Hunt community... But with hundreds of products launched every week, I find it hard to even scratch the surface with the little time I have to click and read. That's why we're launching The Daily Product, an AI-generated podcast developed by the team at Podcraftr to help cover the top products and discussions on Product Hunt, and a few that may have missed the home page. The Daily Product is generated each morning using Podcraftr's automated text-to-podcast technology, then published and distributed to everywhere you listen to podcasts. Apple, Spotify, Amazon, iHeartRadio, you name it. Though the podcast has been live for over a month, we're continuing to fine-tune the [...] Report

@nancy\_zhou\_klee It's about as deep as you can get in about 10-15min! The idea came out of a personal need as with a family, my reading-at-a-screen time is very minimal, but my listening time is much larger. This lets me stay up to date whilst maximizing my time.

Report

David Carter

The Daily Product sounds like a super convenient way to keep up with everything on PH! Just gave it a listen, and it seems like a great way to stay in the loop without having to scroll through tons of posts. Congrats on the launch!

4.9

Based on 17 reviews

Review Daily.co?

Reviewers offer a narrow but clearly positive view of Daily.co: users say it combines advanced capabilities with an intuitive interface, making onboarding quick and easy. Founder feedback is sparse and mostly lacks detail, but one maker of Gradient Bang explicitly calls it the best WebRTC infrastructure for developers, reinforcing its reputation for strong technical foundations. With so little critical feedback in the reviews provided, the clearest takeaway is ease of use paired with solid developer-oriented infrastructure.
